title: RAGAS Eval
description: RAG-specific evaluation metrics using the RAGAS framework. Enable any combination
of metrics — each enabled metric emits its own score on the answers lane.
Requires a connected LLM node (via the LLM control channel) for judge calls.
Wire: answers (LLM output), questions (original query), documents (retrieved context),
text (expected answer, optional — enables context_recall and factual_correctness).

llm.description: LLM used as the RAGAS evaluator judge.

output.description: One score object per enabled metric: {score, passed, metric, threshold, reason}

input.description: Retrieved context chunks (required for faithfulness, context_precision, context_recall)
Expected / ground-truth answer (required for context_recall, factual_correctness)

threshold.title: Pass Threshold
threshold.description: Minimum score to pass (0.0 – 1.0), applied to all enabled metrics.

faithfulness.title: Faithfulness
faithfulness.description: Are all claims in the answer grounded in the retrieved context? (LLM-only, no embeddings)

answer_relevancy.title: Answer Relevancy
answer_relevancy.description: Is the answer relevant to the original query? (Requires OPENAI_API_KEY env var for embeddings)

context_precision.title: Context Precision
context_precision.description: Of the retrieved chunks, what fraction is actually relevant? (LLM-only)

context_recall.title: Context Recall
context_recall.description: Does the context contain all information needed to answer? (Requires ground-truth — wire text lane)

factual_correctness.title: Factual Correctness
factual_correctness.description: Does the answer match the ground-truth? (Requires ground-truth — wire text lane)
